message:
feat: wire Parquet & Iceberg formats through TS edge layer

Add format detection and decoding for Parquet files and Iceberg tables
so users can query .parquet files in R2 with the same code-first API.
Everything downstream of TableMeta (scanPages, coalesceRanges,
assembleRows) is format-agnostic — format-specific work is concentrated
in metadata parsing and page decoding.

New files:
- src/parquet.ts: Thrift compact protocol decoder, Parquet footer
  parser, detectFormat(), parquetMetaToTableMeta()
- src/parquet-decode.ts: Snappy decompression, RLE/bit-packed hybrid
  decoder, Parquet page header parser, decodeParquetColumnChunk()
- src/iceberg.ts: Iceberg JSON metadata parser, manifest path
  extractor, type mapping

Modified:
- src/types.ts: PageEncoding, IcebergSchema, IcebergDatasetMeta,
  optional footer on TableMeta, format field
- src/decode.ts: Parquet encoding branch in decodeAllColumns
- src/query-do.ts: Format detection, .parquet path probing,
  loadIcebergFromR2, format-aware invalidation
- src/index.ts: Format detection in LocalExecutor (file + URL)
- src/master-do.ts: Format-aware readFooterAndColumns + broadcast

No Zig/WASM changes. All 89 tests pass (30 new).
